body:
## Scope

This specification defines package ownership for packaged SSOT JSON schema files.

## Rules

1. `ssot-contracts` SHALL be the only package-owned master source for packaged JSON schema files.
2. `ssot-core` SHALL load packaged schema text through the `ssot_contracts` API and SHALL NOT ship duplicate schema JSON files in its own package.
3. Any repo-local `.ssot/schemas` tree SHALL be treated as a derived repository artifact, not a package-owned schema authority.
4. Schema contract changes SHALL be authored in `ssot-contracts` first.

## Enforcement

- `pkgs/ssot-contracts` package data SHALL include the packaged schema JSON files.
- `pkgs/ssot-core` package data SHALL NOT include a duplicate schema JSON tree.
- Runtime schema consumers in `ssot-core` SHALL resolve packaged schemas via `ssot_contracts.load_schema_text()`.
summary: This specification defines package ownership for packaged SSOT JSON schema files.
title: Packaged schema ownership
